mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sp_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sp_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sp_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%') AND department = #{department} ORDER BY gmt_create DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_user (id, username, password, department, real_name, email, is_enabled) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{department}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{isEnabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_user SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sp_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
